# Laboratoriomecanicadesuelos — Copiapó

> Geotechnical engineering services in Copiapó, Chile.

- Website: https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Copiapó, Chile.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
